howItWorks.intro: This setlist time calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.
rules: Total Time = (Songs × Avg Length) + ((Songs-1) × Gap) + Banter
howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.question: How long should a set be?
faq.answer: Club sets are typically 45-60 minutes. Bar gigs often run 3-4 hours with 3-4 sets and breaks. Festival slots vary from 30-90 minutes.

howWeCalculate.intro: This setlist time calculator uses established formulas and current data to provide accurate estimates.

Our algorithm applies the relevant formulas using your inputs
